text: Plaintiff alleges Workday's AI screening tools caused discriminatory job-application rejections based on age, race, and disability-related factors. The case is included as a vendor-liability candidate because the public record identifies AI screening and a court allowed key claims to proceed, but discrete error rows may need to be split by plaintiff or application event.
ai_system_name: Workday HiredScore / Candidate Skills Match tools
deployer: Workday, Inc. as HR software vendor
canonical_source_conflicted: ADEA, Title VII, ADA, FEHA, and employer-specific applicant records
mitigation_gap: Alleged lack of disparate-impact audit, biased training/preferences, and absence of meaningful human review before rejection.
reliance_or_harm: Plaintiff alleges repeated job rejections through Workday systems; ADEA collective certification was reported.
